_comment: Vanilla-matched netherite alloy. 4 gold + 4 ancient debris (576 mB each = 4 ingots' worth) yields 1 netherite ingot's worth (144 mB). Requires 2200°C — netherite's meltingTemp — gating it behind high-tier fuel. Modpack authors can ship a more generous recipe at the same path to override this.
